query:
SELECT id, gameDate, awayTeam, homeTeam, bracketRound, bracketRegion, bracketSlot, bracketGameId, 
       awaySpread, homeSpread, total, awayML, homeML,
       modelAwaySpread, modelHomeSpread, modelTotal, modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
       modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, modelAwayWinPct, modelHomeWinPct,
       publishedModel, publishedToFeed, sport
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-21' AND sport = 'NCAAM'
ORDER BY sortOrder, id;
